Source   Edit  

Imports

stringresize

Types

BufferLoader = proc (): string
Source   Edit   
HoloReader = object
  doLineColumn*: bool = true
  buffer*: string            ## buffer string, users need to access directly & keep track of position
  bufferLoader*: BufferLoader ## loads a string at a time to add to the buffer when needed
                              ## set to nil after returning empty string
  freeBefore*: int           ## position before which we can cull the buffer
  bufferLocks*: int
  bufferPos*: int
  line*, column*: int
Source   Edit  

Consts

holoReaderLineColumn {.booldefine.} = true
enables/disables line column tracking by default, has very little impact on performance Source   Edit   
holoReaderPeekStrCopyMem {.booldefine.} = false
possible minor optimization, seems slightly slower in practice Source   Edit
